zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolas V de Rumigny於1200年出生時，他的父親Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny50歲，母親Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes30歲。他於1214年5月與Isabelle de Coucy結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1257年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯艾維斯勒-孔特享年57歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾尤拉波納分泰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolas V de Rumigny于1200年出生时，他的父亲Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny50岁，母亲Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes30岁。他于1214年5月与Isabelle de Coucy结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1257年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯艾維斯勒-孔特享年57岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾尤拉波納分泰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolas V de Rumigny was born in 1200, his father, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, was 50 and his mother, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, was 30. He married Isabelle de Coucy in May 1214. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1257, in Avesnes-le-Comte, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Bonnefontaine, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolas V de Rumigny est né en 1200, son père, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Coucy en mai 1214. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1257, à Avesnes-le-Comte, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Bonnefontaine, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolas V de Rumigny 1200 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny 50 und seine Mutter Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes 30. Er hat im Mai 1214 Isabelle de Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1257 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Avesnes-le-Comte, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Bonnefontaine, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas V de Rumigny è nato il nel 1200, il suo padre, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Coucy nel maggio 1214. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1257, nel Avesnes-le-Comte, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Bonnefontaine, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas V de Rumignyが1200年に生まれた時，父Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumignyは50歳，母Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnesは30歳であった。1214年5月にIsabelle de Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1257年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスエイベスネス-レ-コムトで57歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeジュラボネフォンティアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas V de Rumigny(이)가 1200년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1214년 5월 Isabelle de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1257년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스 에베스네스-레-코트에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 라 보네폰테인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas V de Rumigny nasceu em 1200, seu pai, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Coucy em maio de 1214. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1257, em Avesnes-le-Comte, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Bonnefontaine, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolas V de Rumigny родился в 1200 г., его отцу по имени Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Coucy май 1214 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1257 г. в местности авеснес-ле-комт, аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности боннофонтеин, джура, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicolas V de Rumigny nació en 1200, su papá, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Coucy en mayo de 1214. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1257, en Avesnes-le-Comte, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Bonnefontaine, Jura, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
